baseline_behavior: Kind, understanding, and steady leader who supports employees while maintaining order across the entire store
power_expression: Her presence enforces structure and stability, restoring order to chaotic environments and aligning everyone back into their roles
abilities: Projects calm authority that others naturally follow
Reinforces roles and responsibilities without confrontation
Maintains emotional balance across the team
Absorbs and redistributes stress within the environment
limitations: Takes on emotional weight of the entire team
Relies on others for physical execution of tasks
May delay decisive action to preserve harmony
Can become overwhelmed if too many issues stack at once
fears_or_stressors: Loss of control over the environment
quirks_and_ticks: Enjoys small moments of care like hair braiding
Welcomes gestures of appreciation like shoulder rubs
speech_patterns: Uses simple, clear direction when needed

superhero_form.costume: refined, elevated version of her work attire

notes: Central authority figure; represents stability, care, and structure within the system
